publication_date_hint: Publication dates in page metadata and monthly release pages. Multiple formats reflect data updates and revisions across different time periods.
subject_period_hint: Subject period varies by sub-dataset: Monthly CSV files from 2025 onwards, Annual XLSX files (Apr-Mar), and historical data from 2022-23. Month/year inference from filenames.
subpage_link_hint: Current year release pages (e.g., 2025-26) contain monthly CSV files. Historical XLSX files are on landing pages organized by date range.

targets.notes: Monthly CSV files (2025 onwards). Filenames contain period (Apr-Aug, Oct-Mar, etc.). 'Provisional' indicates preliminary data.
Annual XLSX files organized by provider. Naming pattern: 'CWT-CRS-[StartMonth]-[Year]-to-[EndMonth]-[Year]-Data-Extract-Provider-Final.xlsx' (Apr to Mar years).
ICB/Commissioner organizational level data. XLSX files for half-yearly periods. Naming includes ICB/Sub-Location in file references.
Combined annual data (Apr-Mar fiscal years). CSV format. 'Final' indicates complete year data. Both historical (xlsx 2022-25) and recent (csv 2024-25+).
